config.script:
'getCurrentRKS() #include "50120"
function from_cursor_budget (byval obj, byref pTable , byval strOptionalMessage)
dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(pTable).removeall tab.gettable.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_BODY dim pRKS:set pRKS = getCurrentRKS()
dim crs:set crs = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5KONTO_BUDZET,"pKonto=" + cstr(obj.idobj),"","") dim elem
for each elem in crs if elem.pBudzet.dDataDo < pRKS.dDataRozp then tab.newrow.newcell.addtext elem.text else tab.newrow.newcell.addtexthli elem.text , doc_.createhlistr( _ doc_.afc.convert.formatter(" OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI(TYPEID_N5KONTO_BUDZET,%1) ").add(CStr(elem.idobj)).done()) end if next
tab.newrow.newcell.addtext("")
end function
